positive: Minimalist celestial landscape illustration, featuring a stylized crescent moon peeking over a stylized cluster of gentle, geometric stars. The stars should form constellations and nebulae in vibrant shades of indigo, sapphire blue, and amethyst purple, contrasted sharply against a deep black velvet sky. Include abstract, glowing wisps of cosmic dust that follow elegant, curved lines, giving a sense of gentle movement. The overall style must be clean, graphic, and modern, reminiscent of linocut mixed with digital watercolor, perfect for screen printing. Central composition, high contrast, clear outlines, suitable for a single repeating motif on fabric.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, out of focus, excessive details, complex characters, messy lines
